Tests for BLE advertisement and iBeacon data parsing, and build script for Bluetooth-related C files.


## Files
- **[test_ble_ad_parse.c](test_ble_ad_parse.c.md)**: Tests for parsing and creating Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) advertisement data in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_ble_ibeacon.c](test_ble_ibeacon.c.md)**: Tests for parsing and composing BLE iBeacon data using stubbed functions and assertions.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing Bluetooth-related C source files in the firmware.
